subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha'u'llah! Those regions and environs are the ground wherein grew the blessed Tree, and are the homeland of the Desired One.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت بهاء الله آن حدود و ثغور منبت شجره مبارکه است و موطن حضرت مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
